rows.label: tev001891_MSG0001
rows.name: Chief! What are you doing here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001891_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Miia who the man is beside her.

rows.label: tev001891_JNK0020
rows.name: Invite

rows.label: tev001891_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Miia to join you for dinner.

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0002
rows.name: Isn't it obvious? He's a client![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ooo, sorry. Right now I'm having
an important discussion with
this client about a mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0004
rows.name:
So while I'm thrilled to be
invited, I have to decline.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0005
rows.name:
Anyway, could you maybe sorta...leave
us alone now? You're interrupting
our delicate negotiations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_JNK0030
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: tev001891_SEL0031
rows.name:
Express concern about the nature
of the client's mission.

rows.label: tev001891_JNK0040
rows.name: Lie

rows.label: tev001891_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say that you need Miia's help
on a different mission so she
will quit pursuing this one.

rows.label: tev001891_JNK0050
rows.name: Assist

rows.label: tev001891_SEL0051
rows.name:
Offer to work with Miia to
complete the client's job.

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0006
rows.name:
Admittedly, this is an unusual place and time to meet a
client about a job, but I assure you there's nothing
suspicious about the request itself! Nope! Nuuuuh-uh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0007
rows.name:
And I'll also remind you that I'm now a full-fledged
BLADE who can easily handle whatever type of mission
this cruel world sees fit to fling at her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0008
rows.name:
Perhaps you're looking to get in on the job and
divvy up the reward money? I bet you are, you sly
dog, you! But the answer is still a big no.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm gonna make like a bass and
handle this job solo! ...Get it?
Solo? "So low"? Bass? Never mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0010
rows.name:
Anyway, please stop trying
to get all up in my biz.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0011
rows.name:
I appreciate your concern,
Chief. I really do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0012
rows.name: But my answer is still a big negatory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0013
rows.name:
Plus, I know you don't have a
mission for me. You just made
that up, you sly dog, you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0014
rows.name:
And I'm too busy with my REAL mission to
run around chasing down your fake one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0015
rows.name:
And I'll also remind you that I'm now a full-fledged
BLADE who can easily handle whatever type of mission
this cruel world sees fit to fling at her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0016
rows.name:
So please step up off
my grill. Okay, Chief?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0017
rows.name: Nope! Tooootally not necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0018
rows.name:
Hey, are you just looking to get in on the job
and divvy up the reward? I bet you are, you sly
dog, you! But the answer is still a big no.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'm gonna make like a bass and
handle this job solo! ...Get it?
Solo? "So low"? Bass? Never mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0020
rows.name:
Admittedly, this is an unusual place and time to meet a
client about a job, but I assure you there's nothing
suspicious about the request itself! Nope! Nuuuuh-uh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0021
rows.name:
Juuust a normal job. Nothing special about it.
Almost boring, actually. Sleepy-time and all
that. Heck, the reward isn't even that good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0022
rows.name:
And I'll also remind you that I'm now a full-fledged
BLADE who can easily handle whatever type of mission
this cruel world sees fit to fling at her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001891_MSG0023
rows.name:
So make like a donut and roll on
outta here! ...Er, donuts roll,
right? The cake kind, at least?[ST:wait ]
